phrases.text_local: Kde je vstup na zámeckou věž?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech orientation often uses landmarks like fountains or courtyards.

likely_response.local: Na druhém nádvoří, vpravo od kašny.
likely_response.translation_en: In the second courtyard, to the right of the fountain.

responses.english: In the second courtyard, to the right of the fountain.
responses.french: Na druhém nádvoří, vpravo od kašny.

phrases.cultural_note: Tours of the Baroque Theater have limited capacity and specific times.

likely_response.local: Ano, další začíná za dvacet minut.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the next one starts in twenty minutes.

responses.english: Yes, the next one starts in twenty minutes.
responses.french: Ano, další začíná za dvacet minut.

phrases.cultural_note: The Egon Schiele Art Centrum is a major cultural institution in the town.

likely_response.local: V Široké ulici, hned vedle hospody.
likely_response.translation_en: On Široká street, right next to the pub.

responses.english: On Široká street, right next to the pub.
responses.french: V Široké ulici, hned vedle hospody.

phrases.intent_en: How do I book raft rental?
phrases.cultural_note: Rafting is popular on the Vltava; rentals are often first-come, first-served.

likely_response.local: Zajděte do půjčovny u řeky pod mostem.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the rental office by the river under the bridge.

responses.english: Go to the rental office by the river under the bridge.
responses.french: Zajděte do půjčovny u řeky pod mostem.
